title: Excalibur | Fresh Animations Patch
description: A Resource Pack that makes Excalibur compatible with Fresh Animations and Freshly Modded!
body:
![EFA Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b59b8cf5eb90045ef45a9c598d0364a9c7bf469.png)

Fresh animations, classic Excalibur vibes.

--- ### ![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a489900d9108e0b27130dcfb35769244ca565091.png) Compatibility - Full support for **[Fresh Animations v1.10.3](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)** - Compatible with **[Maffhew's Excalibur v1.21.11](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal)** - Compatible with **[Excalibur | Clarent Edition](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clarent)** - Works with **Minecraft 1.20.0 – 1.21.11** - Maintains the visual identity of Excalibur while improving realism and immersion
Requirements To use this addon, you'll need: **Required Mods** - OptiFine or ETF/EMF *(Optifine is currenlty bugged, use it at your own risk)* **Required Packs** - [Fresh Animations v1.10.3+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) - [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) - [Excalibur | Clarent Edition](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clarent) **Optional Packs** - [F.M.R.P](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/freshly-modded) – Needed for Guard Villagers support
Mod Support Excalibur | Fresh Animations includes support for the following mods: - **Guard Villagers** - Based on textures by TimothyWiggins - Additional mod support may be considered in the future > ![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a60f882e259dc6c0628f2f42f8b7eb0a12e99144.png) *Mod support may vary slightly depending on Minecraft version and mod updates.*
--- ## ![Load Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0074de6e296ae110694b55ed238deffb36b96e9.png) Load Order 💡 **Recommended Load Order for Best Compatibility:** 1. **Excalibur** 2. **Excalibur | Clarent Edition** *(required)* 3. **Fresh Animations** (v1.10.3) 4. **Freshly Modded Resource Pack (FMRP)** – *(optional, for Guard Villagers support)* 5. **Excalibur | Fresh Animations** > ![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a60f882e259dc6c0628f2f42f8b7eb0a12e99144.png) **Important:** > - **Clarent must load directly above Excalibur.** > - **Other addons should load above Clarent.** --- ## ![Pridwen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bbedc28a0884d735530759582d141796388f6c1.png) About The Round Table **The Round Table** is a gathering of resource packs crafted around **Excalibur** and expanded by **GrandPappyJay**, offering broader version compatibility, additional visual variants, and small touches of expansion — all designed to stay true to the heart of Excalibur’s world. | Minecraft Version | [Clarent](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clarent) | Echoes | [EFA Patch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excalibur-fresh-animations) | Intended for use with... | |:------------------|:--------|:--------------------|:-----------------------|:---------| | 1.20.0 – 1.20.1 | 215.4.a | *Coming Soon* | 215.4.a | Excalibur 1.21.5 + Fresh Animations 1.9.2 | | 1.20.2 – 1.21.2 | 215.4.b | *Coming Soon* | 215.4.b | Excalibur 1.21.5 + Fresh Animations 1.9.2 | | 1.21.3 – 1.21.4 | 215.4.b | *Coming Soon* | 215.4.b | Excalibur 1.21.5 + Fresh Animations 1.9.3 | | 1.21.5 – 1.21.5 | 215.4.b | *Coming Soon* | 215.4.b | Excalibur 1.21.5 + Fresh Animations 1.9.4 | > *Listen closely... Echoes are stirring beyond the horizon.* ---
Pack Versioning Explained Each download now follows this structure: [ Excalibur Version Without the 1 ] . [ Pack Build ] . [ Support Variant ] Example: EFA_215.1.a.zip | Part | Meaning | Example | |:-----|:--------|:--------| | 215 | Excalibur Version Supported | **Excalibur 1.21.5** | | 1 | EFA Build Number | First full release for this Excalibur version | | a / b | Compatibility Variant | Fresh Animations Version Supported | --- ### 🔹 Compatibility Variants | Variant | Minecraft Versions | Fresh Animations Versions | |:--------|:-------------------------------|:--------------------------| | a | 1.20.0–1.20.1 *(Pre-Overlay)* | Fresh Animations 1.9.2 | | b | 1.20.2–1.21.2 *(Post-Overlay)* | Fresh Animations 1.9.2 | | b | 1.21.3–1.21.4 *(Post-Overlay)* | Fresh Animations 1.9.3 | | b | 1.21.5–1.21.5 *(Post-Overlay)* | Fresh Animations 1.9.4 | > Choose your download based on your Minecraft version and any optional addon packs you are using. *Now aligned with Clarent*
--- ## ![Community Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a850b4352ea2143a6b66f528118a6adb3c6294fd.png) Excalibur Community & Credits ### ![Invite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/453606ca4b361cb344af3f82b0636cc06afbc8ef.png) Join the Community Have a bug to report? An idea to share? Or just want to chat about Excalibur? [Join the Official Excalibur Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qYZ9Pen) > ![Map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2bdbe237044aa18651d9cbf95f8c2eda5803cba.png) *Adventure awaits — and every voice shapes the journey!* --- ### ![Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be985295c2a2d2c0613c75a0adedb9bad4b3b3b1.png) Credits Special thanks to the amazing creators who made this addon possible: - **[Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew)** – Creator of *Excalibur* - **[FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)** – Creator of *Fresh Animations* - **TimothyWiggins127** – Guard Villagers texture assets - **[SebSemos](https://modrinth.com/user/SebSemos)** – Creator of *Freshly Modded Resource Pack (FMRP)* --- ### ![Discover More](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebbf723731a43e74defbc96665ae3f994561efc4.png) Discover More Excalibur Creations Love Excalibur?
